title: quercus undulata var. grisea
intro: Quercus undulata var. grisea, also known as the Mountain Live Oak, is a variety of the Quercus undulata tree native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This deciduous tree is valued for its medicinal properties, which include astringent, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Quercus undulata var. grisea include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
